source: On the north they have North Korea with five hundred thousand well-trained, well-equipped troops - they are supported by the People's Republic of China; they are supported by the Soviet Union.

Text: Very often, Congress has passed laws in the past designed to help people with, uh, home ownership and with crime control and with adequate health care and education programs, etcetera.
source: Quite often Congress has passed laws in the past designed to help people with uh - the ownership of homes and with the control of crime and with adequate health care and education programs and so forth.

Text: We have four million young people doing volunteer work every year, the number has not decreased.
source: We've got four million young people volunteering every year, the number hasn't gone down.

Text: Medicare is funded by the American taxpayer.
source: Medicare is paid for by the American taxpayer.

Text: We were safer before President Bush took office.
source: We were safer before President Bush came to office.

Text: I don't want my ten-year-old grandchild to go to a restricted movie.
source: I don't want my ten year old grandchild to go into an X-rated movie.

Text: For example, in the transportation department, uh, we have reduced the total number of employees by about 25 percent.
source: For instance, in the Transportation Department uh we had uh - we cut back about 25 percent of the total number of employees.

Text: You have been doing this for 30 years.
source: You've been doing this for 30 years.

Text: The Republicans reduced spending by 53 billion dollars, which is why the budget seemed good.
source: Republicans have cut 53 billion dollars in spending, that's why the budget looked good.

Text: There were several tax increases that were gradually introduced over a period of time – two more will come between now and 1989.
source: It had several tax increases phased in over a period of time -- there are two more yet to come between now and 1989.

Text: The murders and tragedies had taken place.
source: The killing and tragedies had taken place.

Text: We've been working on that for four, five, six years.
source: We've been for that for four, five, six years.

Text: And today the average soldier is on average at least 15% - and I consider that a very modest estimate - 15% below what has happened with the cost of living during this period.
source: And today, on the average, the average serviceman is at least 15% - and I happen to think that's a very modest estimate - 15% below what has happened to the cost of living over that period of time.

Text: He cannot come here and tell you that he didn't let any child be left behind because he didn't give money for 'No Child Left Behind'.
source: He can't come here and tell you that he's left no child behind because he didn't fund no child left behind.

Text: But as happened at the end of the Democratic Convention, the Republican Party united.
source: But as occurred at the end of the con- Democratic Convention, the Republican Party unified itself.

Text: You see, I don't think we need to tax more and spend more, then say that this will improve the problem.
source: You see, I don't think we need to tax more and spend more, and then say that's going to make the problem better.

Text: Communism is the enemy of all religions; and we, who believe in God, must stand together.
source: Communism is the enemy of all religions; and we who do believe in God must join together.

Text: The constitutional amendment proposed by President Reagan would make it a crime for a woman to have an abortion if she was raped or suffered from incest.
source: The constitutional amendment proposed by President Reagan would make it a crime for a woman to have an abortion if she had been raped or suffered from incest.

Text: It is said, let us give parents the choice between a public, private, or religious school.
source: It says let's give parents the choice of a public, private or public school -- public, private or religious school.

Text: My faith affects everything I do, truly.
source: My faith affects everything that I do, in truth.
